name: Fintech
tagline: Trust-and-compliance aesthetic — deep navy surfaces, restrained mint accent, humanist sans — for banks, payment processors, and regulated SaaS.
audience: Fintech startups, neo-banks, payment processors, regulated SaaS

typography.display: 'Inter Tight', 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif
typography.mono: 'IBM Plex Mono', 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace
